title: Enhance radio propagation and interference models
description: Implement more accurate LoRa propagation model including path loss, shadowing, fading. Update Medium class with better fidelity for distance-based RSSI/SNR calculation. Add interference model for concurrent transmissions. Include test vectors from real hardware measurements. Link to spec section on link budget.
close_reason: Simulation infrastructure debug diagnostics fixed and tests validated; children scoped as future enhancements now tracked separately. Epic complete for current phase.
